languages.original_text: "It seems to me that 'Solomorne Anthar' and 'change' are concepts that lie in diametrically opposed contextual fields."

languages.text: "Мне кажется, "Соломон Антар" и "перемены" — понятия, лежащие в диаметрально противоположных контекстных полях".
"It seems to me that 'Solomorne Anthar' and 'change' are concepts that lie in diametrically opposed contextual fields."
languages.original_text: "Мне кажется, "Соломон Антар" и "перемены" — понятия, лежащие в диаметрально противоположных контекстных полях".

languages.text: «Tengo la impresión de que los conceptos "Solomorne Anthar" y "cambio" ocupan posiciones diametralmente opuestas en la semántica».
languages.original_text: "It seems to me that 'Solomorne Anthar' and 'change' are concepts that lie in diametrically opposed contextual fields."

traits.locale_text: «Tengo la impresión de que los conceptos "Solomorne Anthar" y "cambio" ocupan posiciones diametralmente opuestas en la semántica».

languages.text: 「私には、『ソロモーン・アンサール』と『変化』とは、正反対の文脈的領野に位置する概念であるように思えます」
languages.original_text: "It seems to me that 'Solomorne Anthar' and 'change' are concepts that lie in diametrically opposed contextual fields."

traits.locale_text: 「私には、『ソロモーン・アンサール』と『変化』とは、正反対の文脈的領野に位置する概念であるように思えます」

languages.text: “在我看来，‘索罗蒙·安萨’与‘变化’这两个概念，属于完全相反的语义领域。”
languages.original_text: "It seems to me that 'Solomorne Anthar' and 'change' are concepts that lie in diametrically opposed contextual fields."

traits.locale_text: “在我看来，‘索罗蒙·安萨’与‘变化’这两个概念，属于完全相反的语义领域。”

languages.text: "Mir scheint, 'Solomorne Anthar' und 'Veränderung' sind zwei diametral gegensätzliche Konzepte."
languages.original_text: "It seems to me that 'Solomorne Anthar' and 'change' are concepts that lie in diametrically opposed contextual fields."

traits.locale_text: "Mir scheint, 'Solomorne Anthar' und 'Veränderung' sind zwei diametral gegensätzliche Konzepte."

languages.text: « Il me semble que "Solomorne Anthar" et "changement" sont deux concepts appartenant à des champs contextuels diamétralement opposés. »
languages.original_text: "It seems to me that 'Solomorne Anthar' and 'change' are concepts that lie in diametrically opposed contextual fields."

traits.locale_text: « Il me semble que "Solomorne Anthar" et "changement" sont deux concepts appartenant à des champs contextuels diamétralement opposés. »

languages.text: "Bana öyle geliyor ki 'Solomorne Anthar' ve 'değişim', tamamen zıt bağlamsal alanlarda yer alan kavramlar."
languages.original_text: "It seems to me that 'Solomorne Anthar' and 'change' are concepts that lie in diametrically opposed contextual fields."

traits.locale_text: "Bana öyle geliyor ki 'Solomorne Anthar' ve 'değişim', tamamen zıt bağlamsal alanlarda yer alan kavramlar."
